qa_pairs.question: Why would SLURM commands like `squeue` and `sacct` not be able to find my job after it has completed on Trillium?
qa_pairs.answer: After a job has finished, it is removed from the queue. Consequently, SLURM commands such as `squeue` and `sacct`, which query the queue, will no longer find your job.

qa_pairs.question: How can users inspect the resource usage and performance data of their past jobs on Trillium?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can inspect their past jobs and their resource usage through the my.SciNet portal. This portal saves information about all jobs, including performance data collected every two minutes while the job was running.
